commit af4da44c2ece52a827d1844e0afe2597ab01b41d
Author: Test User <test@example.com>
Date:   Sat Apr 25 13:28:36 2026 -0400

    feat(cmd): migrate ddx agent compare to CompareRuntime + LoadAndResolve [ddx-4c31e465]
    
    SD-024 Stage 2 migration of the `ddx agent run --compare` dispatch site
    off CompareOptions onto CompareRuntime + config.LoadAndResolve, plus a
    behavioral test proving the migrated path executes end-to-end.
    
    - internal/agent/compare_adapter.go: add CompareRuntime (embedding
      AgentRunRuntime + comparison-specific runtime intent) and
      RunCompareWithConfigViaService, the SD-024 successor to
      RunCompareViaService that takes a sealed ResolvedConfig +
      CompareRuntime and assembles CompareOptions internally.
    - cmd/agent_cmd.go: replace the CompareOptions{} construction with
      config.LoadAndResolve(workDir, CLIOverrides{...}) + CompareRuntime
      + RunCompareWithConfigViaService. Durable knobs (Model, Effort,
      Permissions, Timeout) flow through rcfg; per-invocation intent
      flows through the runtime struct.
---
aff2d092 refactor(agent): switch replay path to RunWithConfigViaService [ddx-636ca6d4]
97561a6e chore(tracker): expand B22d scope per worker analysis (atomic cross-caller migration)
1718bdb5 refactor(agent): introduce private runInternal + RunArgs adapter [ddx-dd640c18]
ab3f561a chore(tracker): reopen + rewrite SD-024 B22/B33 ACs to be gate-verifiable
f53ca10d chore(tracker): reopen SD-024 B22 + B33 (fake-closed)
9f81a1f1 chore: tracker — close B29 (runtimelint shipped) + reclaim/retry pattern
40ac58bb feat(lint): add runtimelint analyzer + scoped pre-commit hook (SD-024 Stage 4)
976fffb5 fix(cmd): RouteCandidateStatus.RecentSuccessRate → ProviderReliabilityRate; reopen B29/B33
5a070693 docs(design): add SD-024 + TD-024 — config-driven runtime options

# SD-024 Stage 4 runtime-lint: forbidden durable-knob fields on
    # *Runtime structs and reintroduction of legacy *Options types.
    # Scoped to packages containing staged files, with diagnostics
    # filtered to only those staged files so existing violations in
    # untouched packages don't block unrelated commits. The full-tree
    # gate in the `ci` block fires once the RunOptions/CompareOptions/
    # QuorumOptions retirement beads land.
    runtime-lint:
      <<: *go_checks
      name: "Runtime Lint (SD-024 forbidden runtime fields + legacy options)"
      glob: "cli/**/*.go"
      run: |
        staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR | grep -E '^cli/.+\.go$' || true)
        [ -z "$staged" ] && exit 0
        pkgs=$(printf '%s\n' "$staged" | xargs -n1 dirname | sort -u | sed 's|^cli/|./|' | grep -v '^\./tools/lint/runtimelint' || true)
        [ -z "$pkgs" ] && exit 0
        out=$(go run ./tools/lint/runtimelint/cmd/runtimelint $pkgs 2>&1) || true
        violations=""

[ -z "$staged" ] && exit 0
        pkgs=$(printf '%s\n' "$staged" | xargs -n1 dirname | sort -u | sed 's|^cli/|./|' | grep -v '^\./tools/lint/runtimelint' || true)
        [ -z "$pkgs" ] && exit 0
        out=$(go run ./tools/lint/runtimelint/cmd/runtimelint $pkgs 2>&1) || true
        violations=""
        for f in $staged; do
          bare="${f#cli/}"
          m=$(printf '%s\n' "$out" | grep "/$bare:" || true)
          if [ -n "$m" ]; then
            violations="$violations$m"$'\n'
          fi
        done
        if [ -n "$violations" ]; then
          printf '%s' "$violations"
          exit 1
        fi
        exit 0
      skip:

        - rebase
